Each stop

Where we're
staying.

01
Arrival night
Salvador, Bahia
May 29–30 · 1 night
Salvador is the first major city of the African diaspora in the Americas. Its historic centre Pelourinho — a UNESCO World Heritage Site — is a neighbourhood of coloured colonial buildings, Baroque churches, and Afro-Brazilian culture that exists nowhere else on earth. One night to arrive, eat, walk, sleep.
HotelMarano Hotel · €48 · confirmed ✓
Flight inAzul AD8001 + AD4067 · MAD 10:55 → REC → SSA 18:50
RefKiwi.com 765200425 · PNR BCIJOW · check in with Azul 48h before
CarLocaliza pickup · Salvador Airport · Saturday May 30
02
Car-free island
Morro de São Paulo
May 30 – Jun 5 · 6 nights
A small car-free island off the Bahian coast — no roads, no vehicles, just five beaches connected by sandy paths, warm clear water, and a pace that's very hard to explain until you've experienced it. They park the car on the mainland, take a speedboat across, and spend six nights at One Beach Boutique Hotel right on First Beach.
HotelOne Beach Boutique Hotel · €881 ✓
RoomKing Suite with Ocean View · beachfront · non-refundable
ParkingEstacionamento Fonseca, Valença · R$50/day · reserve ahead
LuggageSuitcases locked in car boot · carry-on only to island
03
Atlantic rainforest coast
Itacaré, Bahia
Jun 5–11 · 6 nights
A small surf town on the southern Bahian coast, surrounded by Atlantic rainforest and connected to the mainland by one of the most beautiful drives in Brazil. The beaches — Concha, Tiririca, Resende — are sheltered coves with warm water. They stay in a private apartment with a full kitchen and rooftop terrace for six days, with waterfall day trips up and down the BA-001 coastal road.
FlatNomads Flats · Rua Nova Conquista 122 · €224 ✓
PaymentBank transfer — contact André & Marina after booking
BeachesConcha · Tiririca · Resende · Havaizinho
Day tripBom Sossego waterfall · 30 min south on BA-001
04
The long stay
Florianópolis
Jun 11 – Aug 11 · 61 nights
Florianópolis is an island city in southern Brazil with over 40 beaches, a strong remote-working community, and a quality of life that's hard to match anywhere at this price. They have a two-bedroom furnished apartment in Lagoa da Conceição — the best neighbourhood, built around a lagoon with cafés and coworking spaces. Two months of actually living somewhere, not just passing through.
ApartmentAirbnb · Cidade Milano · 2 bed, 2 bath · confirmed ✓
BuildingRooftop infinity pool · chef's kitchen · city views · 5.0 ★
ArriveGOL flight landing 18:30 on Jun 11
DepartFLN → GIG · August 11 · to book
05
The finale · Birthday Aug 14 🎂
Rio de Janeiro
Aug 11–16 · 5 nights
One of the most spectacular cities on earth — Cristo Redentor overlooking the bay, Ipanema beach, Tijuca rainforest inside the city, the energy of a place that genuinely knows how to celebrate. They spend five days in Ipanema or Leblon, the best neighbourhoods in Rio. Romi's birthday dinner on August 14th. Five days is exactly right — enough to do it properly and leave wanting to come back.
AirbnbIpanema or Leblon · 5 nights · to book
Flight inFLN → GIG · Aug 11 · to book
BirthdayAugust 14 — Romi turns 26 🎂
